---
name: Suggest a Listing
about: Suggest a pitch competition, host organization, or community group that should
  be included on the list.
title: "[LISTING] "
labels: listing-request
assignees: lkaneda

---

## Organization or Event Name
<!-- e.g. Portland Pitch Night -->


## Website URL
<!-- e.g. https://example.com -->


## Type
<!-- Check one by putting an x in the brackets -->
- [ ] Pitch Competition Host
- [ ] Event Aggregator / Calendar
- [ ] Community Group
- [ ] Other (please explain)

## Is This New?
<!-- New is defined as within the last 6 months for a group or website or the first time an event has been hosted. -->

## Notes
<!-- Any helpful context — how often they hold events, what industry or stage they focus on, who it's for, current status, etc. -->
